Container.Name: signal-cli-gateway
Container.Overview:
Configurable secure Docker container for the signal-cli daemon with optional authentication proxy. Designed for Hermes Agent integration.
BUILD FIRST (one-time from Unraid terminal or SSH): git clone https://github.com/libre-7/signal-cli-gateway.git /tmp/signal-cli-gateway cd /tmp/signal-cli-gateway && docker build -t signal-cli-gateway:latest .
SECURITY MODES (set SECURITY_MODE env var): loopback - signal-cli on 127.0.0.1:8080, no auth. loopback-proxy - signal-cli on 127.0.0.1:8080 + auth proxy on 127.0.0.1:8880. exposed-proxy - Same as above but proxy on 0.0.0.0:8880. unix - UNIX socket + socat TCP bridge.

Config.Name: SIGNAL_ACCOUNT
Config.Description: Your Signal phone number in E.164 format. REQUIRED.

Config.Name: SECURITY_MODE
Config.Description: Security mode: loopback, loopback-proxy, exposed-proxy, unix.

Config.Name: SECURITY_PROXY_TOKEN
Config.Description: Bearer token for proxy. Auto-generated if empty.

Config.Name: SECURITY_PROXY_ALLOWED_IPS
Config.Description: CIDR ranges that bypass proxy auth.

Config.Name: LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Proxy log level: info, debug, warn, error.

Config.Name: Data Volume
Config.Description: Persistent storage for Signal identity keys and config. MUST persist across container updates.
